vocab.meaning: cực kỳ say mê, thích thú điều gì
vocab.example: I'm absolutely head over heels for vintage leather boots because they develop such a unique character over time.

vocab.meaning: đơn giản nhưng hiệu quả, bền bỉ (không quá cầu kỳ)
vocab.example: For daily errands, I prefer a rough and ready pair of sneakers that can withstand any kind of weather.

vocab.meaning: vẹn cả đôi đường (ví dụ: vừa đẹp vừa thoải mái)
vocab.example: Hybrid dress sneakers offer the best of both worlds, combining formal aesthetics with the comfort of athletic footwear.

vocab.meaning: tốn của ai đó rất nhiều tiền
vocab.example: A high-end pair of designer heels might set you back a fortune, but the craftsmanship is often unparalleled.

vocab.meaning: mãn nhãn, một thứ gì đó nhìn rất đẹp
vocab.example: The intricate stitching on these bespoke Oxfords is a real feast for the eyes for any shoe enthusiast.
I tend to go for more down-to-earth styles like flat sandals rather than flashy or impractical high heels.

vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.example: Limited edition trainers can cost an arm and a leg on the resale market, yet people still queue for hours to buy them.

vocab.meaning: rất thịnh hành, đang là mốt
vocab.example: Chunky-soled shoes are all the rage these days, though I personally find them a bit too heavy for my liking.

vocab.meaning: ăn mặc bảnh bao, sang trọng
vocab.example: When I need to be dressed to the nines for a gala, nothing beats a pair of polished patent leather pumps.

vocab.meaning: vừa khít, cực kỳ vừa vặn
vocab.example: I love these running shoes because they fit like a glove, providing support in all the right places without any friction.
